## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Testing

- [ ] `bun run build`
- [ ] `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] `bun run lint`
- [ ] `bun run fmt:check`
- [ ] `bun run test`

## Release Notes

- [ ] Added a changeset, or this change does not affect published behavior.
- [ ] Updated docs in `docs/` where implementation details changed.
